title: Allbirds Popped 800% Intraday on an AI Pivot. Is This the Next GameStop?
description: It was quite the shocker to see shares of former Silicon Valley-loved footwear firm Allbirds (NASDAQ:BIRD) skyrocketing as much as 800% or so at its high point on Wednesday before closing quite a bit lower. Undoubtedly, you just had to know that there was some kind of AI pivot unfolding to produce such an obscene reaction ... Allbirds Popped 800% Intraday on an AI Pivot. Is This the Next GameStop?

title: Samsung bets on AI and 3D displays to change customer experience for businesses
description: Samsung India introduces a glasses-free 3D spatial signage in Gurugram, aiming to change how stores and banks connect with customers in real time.
